title: Dryline Outer Route
notes: Connects south to A4 Badlands Cut and east toward B3 Dryline Outer Road.
Outer Dust-9 road route with Black Road lookout, Sable Kin scout cache, route signal gate, tanker route booth, and windblown escape lanes.
Designed for Astro Van, Sable Kin runners, smuggler vehicles, and limited Red Concord patrol traffic.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
